markdown_projection.note: JSON contract is authority. No markdown projection is generated for WP-KERNEL-009 (prevents projection drift).

scope.scope: Close GAP-LM-011: AI Loom jobs - auto-tag, auto-caption, and batch link-suggestion jobs over LoomBlocks using the operator's local/configured models via existing model-runtime surfaces; ALL suggestions land as PENDING proposals (kernel-event-backed) requiring confirm-to-promote (operator or authorized model) before becoming real edges/fields; batch review UI (accept/reject per item + accept-all-of-kind); full receipts.
constraints: Use the existing microtask_plan_draft execution surface only; do not introduce a separate MT execution surface or suite field.

Core Handshake behavior must be Handshake-native: no outside app, outside server, external daemon, Docker-only path, SQLite fallback, Redis/Valkey cache authority, or sidecar paper as proof or authority.
Bundled/lockfile-governed product libraries only (Tiptap/Monaco precedent); no CDN; no external app launches as product behavior.
PostgreSQL plus EventLedger is canonical for durable state, receipts, indexing evidence, runtime proof, and validation; UI artifacts are projections only.
Every implementation handoff must be restartable by a no-context local model using only the WP/MT contract, current Master Spec bundle (v02.193), product code, tests, and receipts.

OPERATOR ORDER (DEC-007, 2026-06-12): NO scaffolding, templates, mock-ups, or vibecoding; every feature must be working AND tested in runtime (executed vitest/Playwright/real-PG proof per feature, not status text). A feature without an executed runtime proof is NOT done.
NO auto-promotion: suggestions never silently become authority (negative test).
Job runs are EventLedger-receipted with model attribution.
If no model is configured, the job declines loudly (typed error) - no fake suggestions.
scope.expected_behavior: Operator runs auto-tag over an untagged library, reviews proposals, confirms; tags appear as real edges with provenance.
acceptance_criteria: Suggestion -> pending -> confirm -> edge flow real-PG proven end-to-end.
Adversarial self-review recorded per the WP loop; findings fixed before evidence write.
verification: cargo test -p handshake_core --features runtime-full,test-utils (scoped) green with real-PG tests for backend state.
pnpm vitest run green; tsc --noEmit clean; eslint clean.
Offline Playwright runtime proof for each named capability (zero external network requests).
handoff_requirements: List files changed, tests run with exact names/counts, commits.
List EventLedger/PostgreSQL evidence and Playwright artifacts produced.
List remaining risks and any honestly-documented deviations (e.g., prose multi-cursor approach).

evidence: commit bdb688eb on feat/WP-KERNEL-009 (17 files, +3505, migration 0333_loom_ai_suggestions), zero .GOV

runtime proof: 8 real-PG tests PASS (344s) — auto-tag/auto-caption/link-suggest jobs land ALL suggestions as PENDING kernel-event-backed proposals; accept promotes to a real loom_edge/derived field + receipt; reject discards leaving authority untouched; no-model declines typed (no fabrication); vitest 5; tsc/eslint clean; offline Playwright 4 PASS (pending->accept promotes; reject removes pending authority untouched)
confirm-to-promote enforced end-to-end (operator/validator gate; accept-all runs per-item authority, no bulk bypass)
adversarial review caught 7 blockers incl. a migration-0333 schema-registry prefix-constraint violation that was failing ALL real-PG tests at setup; harden fixed every one; remaining_gaps: none

wp_validator_review_v2.review_method: Integration Validator multi-agent workflow (wf_0ac25815-485 + wf_98386044-70a): independent per-MT reviewer + adversarial confirm on FAIL. No ACP. Governance/repo paperwork non-blocking per operator directive (2026-06-18). Bar = good code vs MT contract + WP packet + current Master Spec v02.194, plus the WP_VALIDATOR Spec-Realism Gate.
wp_validator_review_v2.summary: MT-260 requires AI Loom jobs (auto-tag/auto-caption/link-suggest) that land every model suggestion as a PENDING kernel-event-backed proposal, requiring operator/validator confirm-to-promote before becoming real edges/derived fields, with full attribution receipts, durable denials, a typed no-model decline, and accept-all that preserves per-item authority. The committed code (commit bdb688eb) implements all of this with genuine PostgreSQL+EventLedger storage and 8 executed real-PG tests plus offline Playwright, fully aligned with current Master Spec 2.3.13.11 and LM-TAG-005.
findings: src/backend/handshake_core/src/loom_ai/mod.rs:221-345 run_loom_ai_job calls the real LlmClient::completion trait per block, records each suggestion as a PENDING row + AI_EDIT_PROPOSAL_RECORDED event with model attribution; writes nothing to authority. No test-only branch inside the runner.

src/backend/handshake_core/src/loom_ai/mod.rs:245-255 + parse_output:167-212: model decline short-circuits whole job with typed LoomAiJobError::NoModel and zero rows; unusable model text yields None (no fabrication). Real fail-closed behavior, not a placeholder escape.

src/backend/handshake_core/src/loom_ai/promotion.rs:104-109 reviewer_allowed restricts confirm/promote to Operator|Validator; non-operator confirm writes a durable loom_ai_promotion_denied receipt + PROMOTION_REJECTED (deny() 576-640). accept_loom_ai_suggestion:177-324 does decide->atomic PROMOTION_REQUESTED+PROMOTION_ACCEPTED pair->real artifact->mark promoted->knowledge bridge.

promotion.rs:346-396 accept_all_loom_ai_suggestions lists the canonical PENDING set from PG (list_loom_ai_suggestions) and runs the SAME per-item flow, so a non-operator accept-all promotes nothing — no bulk-authority bypass.

migrations/0333_loom_ai_suggestions.sql: real table with FK refs to kernel_event_ledger, CHECK constraints enforcing pending/accepted/rejected/promoted lifecycle invariants and link_suggest-target rule, idempotency unique index; widens denial-receipt allow-list with loom_ai_promotion_denied. No SQLite/in-memory.
src/backend/handshake_core/src/storage/loom_ai.rs:142+ uses genuine sqlx INSERT/UPDATE over PgPool; module doc states no in-memory/SQLite fallback, fails closed with typed StorageError.

tests/loom_ai_suggestions_api_tests.rs: 8 real-PG tests (postgres_backend_with_pool_from_env) assert pending->accept->real Tag/AiSuggested edge created_by=ai, reject leaves authority untouched, non-operator denial receipt + PROMOTION_REJECTED, no-model zero rows, auto_caption derived field + generated_by provenance, idempotency, and adversarial accept-all per-item authority. Event counts queried directly from kernel_event_ledger.

InMemoryLlmClient substitute is a pre-existing production-trait impl in src/llm/ollama.rs:551 (commit 974e689b, predates MT-260); DisabledLlmClient (real no-provider startup path) at src/llm/mod.rs:312. Neither is an implementer-authored mock for this MT.

Current Master Spec v02.194 02-system-architecture.md:2715 requires AI auto-linking/auto-tagging to leave actor/denial/promotion receipts; LM-TAG-005:1593 requires AI tags as AI_SUGGESTED until confirmed. Code matches both.

Boundary/scope clean: all 17 changed files within allowed_paths (src/backend/handshake_core, app/src, tests/visual); zero .GOV changes; no forbidden SQLite/external-search/Docker. Non-blocking aside: packet cites v02.192/v02.193 spec anchors (paperwork drift), resolved against current v02.194 — not a code defect.

minimum_controls: No placeholders, mocks, scaffolding, or deferred-live escapes; runtime proof against Handshake-managed PostgreSQL/EventLedger and/or offline Playwright where the contract names durable state or GUI behavior.
